_comment: Trace-evaluation LLM CLI bindings. Copy to cli.json and customise. The runner writes the composed judge system prompt to {{system_prompt_file}} and the user message ({ dimension_id, context, blueprint, turns }) to {{user_message_file}}, spawns cmd, parses stdout as JSON, and extract_path selects the model's text before it is JSON-parsed and validated against the dimension schema. Set retries to N for up to N additional attempts (total = 1 + N) on CLI failure or schema-validation failure. With no judge step, run.mjs runs mechanical checks only.

judge.description: Invokes an LLM CLI to judge one game-master trace dimension. The bundled wrapper passes the composed system prompt and the user message straight to `claude` and returns its JSON envelope.
